response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, craftsmanship-oriented full-stack engineer with strong testing culture and genuine mentoring instincts, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. His C++ experience amounts to roughly a year (National Instruments plus a thesis project) against a required 8 years, his large-scale infrastructure exposure is limited to about two years at Sociomantic rather than five, and his career centers on web and product development in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than cloud compute platforms. He has no formal technical-leadership role leading platform strategy across teams.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, and authored open-source test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Real high-throughput systems exposure at Sociomantic (low-latency services handling millions of requests/second)
Proven mentor and knowledge-sharer through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement (~1 year, and C++ is absent from his skills list)
Limited large-scale infrastructure/distributed-systems depth (~2 years) versus the 5 years required
No formal technical-lead experience owning platform strategy or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers across teams

key_factors.factor: Testing rigor and mentoring track record
